name: Franck Auplan I Betterplan Solutions
description_short: Betterplan Solutions offers credit repair, dispute filing, and financial coaching to help clients rebuild credit scores and qualify for better loan rates.
description_long:
Betterplan Solutions is a credit repair and financial coaching company based in Jacksonville, Florida, operating under the mission to empower individuals and families to take control of their financial futures through expert credit management and debt solutions. Founded with a focus on integrity, transparency, and measurable results, the company positions itself as a partner for those seeking to recover from poor credit history and financial setbacks.

The company provides a comprehensive suite of credit repair and financial services, including credit report analysis from all three major bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion), credit dispute and repair filing to remove inaccurate or unverifiable negative items, debt validation and negotiation with creditors, credit building strategy advising, financial and budgeting education, and ongoing credit monitoring. They emphasize personalized solutions tailored to individual client situations rather than one-size-fits-all approaches.

Betterplan Solutions distinguishes itself through published performance claims: they state that 95% of clients see credit score improvement within 90 days, report average score increases of 100 points within six months, and claim to have removed hundreds of negative items from client reports in the past year. Client testimonials feature specific outcomes, such as a 150-point improvement enabling better loan rates and approval for mortgage qualification within four months.

While the company presents compelling marketing claims and appears to offer legitimate credit repair services, potential clients should note that credit repair outcomes vary significantly by individual circumstances, and the industry-standard disclaimer applies: legitimate negative items cannot be removed, and results are never guaranteed. The company's claims of 95% improvement rates and specific score increases should be verified during the free consultation, and clients should understand the realistic timeline and limitations of credit repair services.
address: 5615 Ave B Suite A, Jacksonville, FL 32209

company_info.headquarters: 5615 Ave B Suite A, Jacksonville, FL 32209

pros: Offers free credit consultation to assess individual situations before commitment
Provides credit report analysis from all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Includes financial education and budgeting coaching alongside dispute services
Claims 95% of clients see credit score improvement within first 90 days
Reports average 100-point credit score increase within six months for clients
Provides ongoing credit monitoring to detect fraud and track improvements
Offers debt validation and creditor negotiation services to minimize financial impact
cons: Published success rate claims (95% improvement, 100-point increases) are unverified and may not reflect typical results for all client profiles
No clear pricing information available on website—costs and fee structures not disclosed
Limited third-party reviews or verification of company legitimacy and track record available from the website alone
Company cannot remove legitimate negative items, though this limitation is not prominently disclosed on the main marketing copy
Testimonials feature the same two clients repeated multiple times, raising questions about sample size and authenticity
best_for: Consumers with inaccurate or disputed items on their credit reports seeking professional dispute filing
Individuals looking to rebuild credit through education and personalized coaching alongside repair services
People denied for loans or credit who want to understand and improve their credit profile before reapplying
Those with multiple negative items (late payments, collections, charge-offs) wanting negotiated settlements
diagnosis: Betterplan Solutions is best suited for consumers with disputed or inaccurate negative credit items who want professional dispute filing combined with financial education and coaching. The primary caveat is that published success claims are unverified, pricing is not disclosed, and legitimate negative items cannot be removed—clients should confirm realistic expectations and fees during the free consultation before engaging services.
services: Credit report analysis from Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion
Credit dispute and repair filing with credit agencies and creditors
Removal of inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable negative items (late payments, collections, charge-offs)
Debt validation and creditor negotiation for settlement
Credit building strategy advising (secured cards, authorized user status, credit-builder loans)
Financial and budgeting education and personalized coaching
Credit monitoring and fraud detection with alerts
Money management tips and financial habit coaching
